segments.beat: device held in two hands, display face-up showing START screen — retro game boot state, transparent shell edges visible
hands rotate device slightly, angling it so clear shell side and PCB internals catch light — transparency reveal
device tilted further, display goes dark/off, clear body and component layout visible through shell
continued slow rotation in-hand, device flipped to show back face — PCB traces and components seen through rear shell
device repositioned upright in both hands, screen facing camera — display inactive, full front face of unit shown
hands shift grip, device tilted to show top edge and side profile — USB-C port and slim form factor visible
device returned to face-up orientation, thumbs rest on D-pad and A/B buttons — controller grip demo
slow pull-back zoom begins, device recedes in frame showing full unit in both hands over wood-surface table
final wide hold — device shown flat on table surface, both hands release, clear shell and full footprint visible

demonstrates.motion_value: high — rotation actively sweeps light across clear shell, PCB and components visible through body
medium — START screen lit on display, transparency of the display pane not isolated but screen is active
medium — full unit fits easily in two cupped hands, scale relative to adult hands is clear
low — START screen on display implies game state; no active gameplay shown
high — resin shell catches light during rotation, gold PCB traces visible, premium tactile appearance
low — device laid flat on clean surface suggests display/object framing but not explicit
low — USB-C port edge visible during side-profile tilt, PCB visible through shell implies hackability

selection_note: Best clip for transparency_internals_visible — sustained rotation from 0:02–0:12 clearly shows PCB through clear shell; weak on active gameplay so retro_gaming claim needs a different clip to carry it.

aesthetics.weakness: hands dominate 80%+ of frame throughout - device rarely visible
aesthetics.note: handheld overhead with no rig; flat overcast ambient, no color work, device lost in palms most of clip
